query:
SELECT id              as "id!: Uuid",
                      organization_id as "organization_id: Uuid",
                      name,
                      color,
                      sort_order,
                      created_at      as "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>",
                      updated_at      as "updated_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
               FROM projects
               WHERE organization_id = $1
               ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
